steps.title: Identify slope and y-intercept
steps.content: The slope is $m=3$. The point $(0,8)$ has $x=0$, so it is the y-intercept, giving $b=8$.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A: $y=-8x+3$ has slope $-8$, not $3$. Eliminated.
  • B: $y=8x+3$ has slope $8$, not $3$. Eliminated.
  • C: $y=3x-8$ has slope $3$ but y-intercept $-8$, so it does not pass through $(0,8)$. Eliminated.
  • D: $y=3x+8$ has slope $3$ and passes through $(0,8)$.
That confirms D is correct.
